final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI concepts.

Style/medium: needs a "手绘风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Japanese technical illustration (技術系イラスト), Edward Tufte hand-drawn diagram style, Muji product manual illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an infographic layout with clear visual hierarchy showing concept relationships and definitions
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with their definitions and interconnections:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, educational atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include hand-drawn line quality and illustrative elements
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be easy to understand with visual-text integration, concept relationships clearly illustrated
Avoid:
